---
title: "CV"
---

[Download full CV](files/jack_parley_cv.pdf)

## Profile

Researcher with a background in statistical physics and current work in machine learning, language acquisition, and grammar induction.

## Research areas

- Language acquisition from examples alone
- Grammar induction and parsing
- Statistical physics of learning
- Probabilistic modelling
- Deep learning theory
- Prior work in statistical physics and complex systems

## Selected experience

- PhD in statistical physics
- Current AI research on language learning and hierarchical structure
- Experience with probabilistic grammars, inside--outside algorithms, PyTorch, and scientific computing

## Technical skills

- Python
- PyTorch
- Scientific computing
- Probabilistic modelling
- Numerical experiments
- LaTeX
- Git/GitHub

## Languages

6 European languages (+Japanese)
